description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a global before_script "bash .gitlab-ci.sh", defines MYSQL_DATABASE and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD variables, and uses the woohuiren/php-laravel-env:latest Docker image with a mysql:latest service. Add a phpunit job named phpunit:php-laravel-env:mysql in the default test stage that inherits the before_script and variables and executes "php vendor/bin/phpunit --colors". The job should run with the specified image and service.
